/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -g -D_DEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/UABE_macOS.dir/link.d -shared -Wl,-soname,libUABE_macOS.so -o ../bin/libUABE_macOS.so CMakeFiles/UABE_macOS.dir/macOSAppContext.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/runner/work/UABE/UABE/build/UABE_Generic:/home/runner/work/UABE/UABE/build/AssetsTools:/home/runner/work/UABE/UABE/build/ModInstaller:/home/runner/work/UABE/UABE/build/CrnlibWrap:/home/runner/work/UABE/UABE/build ../UABE_Generic/libUABE_Generic.so ../AssetsTools/libAssetsTools.so ../libStringConverter/liblibStringConverter.a ../ModInstaller/libModInstaller.so ../libCompression/liblibCompression.a -Wl,-rpath-link,/home/runner/work/UABE/UABE/build/CrnlibWrap:/home/runner/work/UABE/UABE/build
